```tsx
const handleSelectTest = async (test: TestData) => {
  try {
    const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
    if (!backendUrl) {
      throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
    }

    const response = await fetch(`${backendUrl}/agent-tests`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {
        accept: "application/json",
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        agent_uuid: agentUuid,
        test_uuids: [test.uuid],
      }),
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error("Failed to add test to agent");
    }

    // Add the test to local state
    setAgentTests((prev) => [...prev, test]);
    setShowTestDropdown(false);
    setSearchQuery("");
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Error adding test to agent:", err);
  }
};
```

It looks like the `handleSelectTest` function already makes an API call to `/agent-tests` with a POST request containing `agent_uuid` and `test_uuids`.

Looking at both files, I can see that the API call to `/agent-tests` is **already implemented** in `TestsTabContent.tsx`. 

The `handleSelectTest` function (lines 172-203) already makes a POST request to `/agent-tests`:

```171:203:src/components/agent-tabs/TestsTabContent.tsx
  // Add test to agent
  const handleSelectTest = async (test: TestData) => {
    try {
      const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
      if (!backendUrl) {
        throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
      }

      const response = await fetch(`${backendUrl}/agent-tests`, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: {
          accept: "application/json",
          "Content-Type": "application/json",
          "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          agent_uuid: agentUuid,
          test_uuids: [test.uuid],
        }),
      });

      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error("Failed to add test to agent");
      }

      // Add the test to local state
      setAgentTests((prev) => [...prev, test]);
      setShowTestDropdown(false);
      setSearchQuery("");
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("Error adding test to agent:", err);
    }
  };
```

This is already similar to how tools are added in `AddToolDialog.tsx` (lines 43-80), which makes a POST request to `/agent-tools` with `agent_uuid` and `tool_uuids`.

The functionality you're asking for is already in place - when a test is selected from the dropdown, the `handleSelectTest` function:
1. Makes a POST request to `/agent-tests` with `agent_uuid` and `test_uuids`
2. Updates the local state to show the newly added test
3. Closes the dropdown

Is there a specific issue you're experiencing with this functionality, or would you like me to modify something about how this API call is made?

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,332 @@
- 
+ "use client";
+ 
+ import React, { useState } from "react";
+ import {
+   llmProviders,
+   type LLMModel,
+ } from "./agent-tabs/constants/providers";
+ 
+ type BenchmarkDialogProps = {
+   isOpen: boolean;
+   onClose: () =&gt; void;
+   agentName: string;
+ };
+ 
+ export function BenchmarkDialog({
+   isOpen,
+   onClose,
+   agentName,
+ }: BenchmarkDialogProps) {
+   const [selectedModels, setSelectedModels] = useState&lt;(LLMModel | null)[]&gt;([
+     null,
+   ]);
+ 
+   if (!isOpen) return null;
+ 
+   const handleClose = () =&gt; {
+     setSelectedModels([null]);
+     onClose();
+   };
+ 
+   const handleAddModel = () =&gt; {
+     setSelectedModels((prev) =&gt; [...prev, null]);
+   };
+ 
+   const handleSelectModel = (index: number, model: LLMModel) =&gt; {
+     setSelectedModels((prev) =&gt; {
+       const newModels = [...prev];
+       newModels[index] = model;
+       return newModels;
+     });
+   };
+ 
+   const handleRemoveModel = (index: number) =&gt; {
+     setSelectedModels((prev) =&gt; {
+       if (prev.length === 1) return prev;
+       return prev.filter((_, i) =&gt; i !== index);
+     });
+   };
+ 
+   // Get IDs of already selected models
+   const selectedModelIds = new Set(
+     selectedModels.filter((m) =&gt; m !== null).map((m) =&gt; m!.id)
+   );
+ 
+   // Get available models for a given row (excluding already selected ones, except the current row's selection)
+   const getAvailableModels = (currentIndex: number) =&gt; {
+     const currentModel = selectedModels[currentIndex];
+     return llmProviders.map((provider) =&gt; ({
+       ...provider,
+       models: provider.models.filter(
+         (model) =&gt;
+           !selectedModelIds.has(model.id) ||
+           (currentModel &amp;&amp; model.id === currentModel.id)
+       ),
+     }));
+   };
+ 
+   const canRunBenchmark = selectedModels.some((m) =&gt; m !== null);
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50"&gt;
+       &lt;div className="bg-background border border-border rounded-xl w-full max-w-lg max-h-[80vh] flex flex-col shadow-2xl"&gt;
+         {/* Header */}
+         &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4 border-b border-border"&gt;
+           &lt;div&gt;
+             &lt;h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
+               Run Benchmark
+             &lt;/h2&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
+               Select models to benchmark for &amp;quot;{agentName}&amp;quot;
+             &lt;/p&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={handleClose}
+             className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+           &gt;
+             &lt;svg
+               className="w-5 h-5"
+               fill="none"
+               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+               stroke="currentColor"
+               strokeWidth={2}
+             &gt;
+               &lt;path
+                 strokeLinecap="round"
+                 strokeLinejoin="round"
+                 d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"
+               /&gt;
+             &lt;/svg&gt;
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Content */}
+         &lt;div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-4"&gt;
+           &lt;div className="space-y-3"&gt;
+             &lt;label className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+               Select Models
+             &lt;/label&gt;
+ 
+             {/* Model Rows */}
+             {selectedModels.map((selectedModel, index) =&gt; (
+               &lt;ModelSelector
+                 key={index}
+                 index={index}
+                 selectedModel={selectedModel}
+                 availableProviders={getAvailableModels(index)}
+                 onSelect={(model) =&gt; handleSelectModel(index, model)}
+                 onRemove={
+                   selectedModels.length &gt; 1
+                     ? () =&gt; handleRemoveModel(index)
+                     : undefined
+                 }
+               /&gt;
+             ))}
+ 
+             {/* Add Model Button */}
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={handleAddModel}
+               className="w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium border border-dashed border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+             &gt;
+               &lt;svg
+                 className="w-4 h-4"
+                 fill="none"
+                 viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                 stroke="currentColor"
+                 strokeWidth={2}
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;path
+                   strokeLinecap="round"
+                   strokeLinejoin="round"
+                   d="M12 4.5v15m7.5-7.5h-15"
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/svg&gt;
+               Add model
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Footer */}
+         &lt;div className="px-6 py-4 border-t border-border flex items-center justify-end gap-3"&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={handleClose}
+             className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+           &gt;
+             Cancel
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={() =&gt; {
+               // TODO: Implement benchmark run
+               console.log("Running benchmark with models:", selectedModels);
+               handleClose();
+             }}
+             disabled={!canRunBenchmark}
+             className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
+           &gt;
+             &lt;svg
+               className="w-4 h-4"
+               fill="none"
+               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+               stroke="currentColor"
+               strokeWidth={2}
+             &gt;
+               &lt;path
+                 strokeLinecap="round"
+                 strokeLinejoin="round"
+                 d="M5.25 5.653c0-.856.917-1.398 1.667-.986l11.54 6.348a1.125 1.125 0 010 1.971l-11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 01-1.667-.985V5.653z"
+               /&gt;
+             &lt;/svg&gt;
+             Run Benchmark
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
+ // Model Selector Component
+ type ModelSelectorProps = {
+   index: number;
+   selectedModel: LLMModel | null;
+   availableProviders: { name: string; models: LLMModel[] }[];
+   onSelect: (model: LLMModel) =&gt; void;
+   onRemove?: () =&gt; void;
+ };
+ 
+ function ModelSelector({
+   selectedModel,
+   availableProviders,
+   onSelect,
+   onRemove,
+ }: ModelSelectorProps) {
+   const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
+   const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
+ 
+   const filteredProviders = availableProviders
+     .map((provider) =&gt; ({
+       ...provider,
+       models: provider.models.filter(
+         (model) =&gt;
+           model.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
+           provider.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
+       ),
+     }))
+     .filter((provider) =&gt; provider.models.length &gt; 0);
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+       &lt;div className="relative flex-1"&gt;
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={() =&gt; setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
+           className="w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 flex items-center justify-between cursor-pointer transition-colors"
+         &gt;
+           &lt;span
+             className={
+               selectedModel ? "text-foreground" : "text-muted-foreground"
+             }
+           &gt;
+             {selectedModel ? selectedModel.name : "Select a model..."}
+           &lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;svg
+             className={&#96;w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground transition-transform ${
+               isOpen ? "rotate-180" : ""
+             }&#96;}
+             fill="none"
+             viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+             stroke="currentColor"
+             strokeWidth={2}
+           &gt;
+             &lt;path
+               strokeLinecap="round"
+               strokeLinejoin="round"
+               d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
+             /&gt;
+           &lt;/svg&gt;
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Dropdown */}
+         {isOpen &amp;&amp; (
+           &lt;&gt;
+             &lt;div
+               className="fixed inset-0 z-40"
+               onClick={() =&gt; {
+                 setIsOpen(false);
+                 setSearchQuery("");
+               }}
+             /&gt;
+             &lt;div className="absolute top-full left-0 right-0 mt-1 bg-background border border-border rounded-lg shadow-lg z-50 max-h-64 overflow-hidden flex flex-col"&gt;
+               {/* Search */}
+               &lt;div className="p-2 border-b border-border"&gt;
+                 &lt;input
+                   type="text"
+                   value={searchQuery}
+                   onChange={(e) =&gt; setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
+                   placeholder="Search models..."
+                   className="w-full h-8 px-3 rounded-md text-sm border border-border bg-muted/30 text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent"
+                   autoFocus
+                   onClick={(e) =&gt; e.stopPropagation()}
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               {/* Models List */}
+               &lt;div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto"&gt;
+                 {filteredProviders.length === 0 ? (
+                   &lt;div className="p-4 text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                     No models found
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 ) : (
+                   filteredProviders.map((provider) =&gt; (
+                     &lt;div key={provider.name}&gt;
+                       &lt;div className="px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground bg-muted/30 sticky top-0"&gt;
+                         {provider.name}
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                       {provider.models.map((model) =&gt; (
+                         &lt;button
+                           key={model.id}
+                           onClick={() =&gt; {
+                             onSelect(model);
+                             setIsOpen(false);
+                             setSearchQuery("");
+                           }}
+                           className={&#96;w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm text-left hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+                             selectedModel?.id === model.id ? "bg-muted/50" : ""
+                           }&#96;}
+                         &gt;
+                           {model.name}
+                         &lt;/button&gt;
+                       ))}
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   ))
+                 )}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/&gt;
+         )}
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Remove Button */}
+       {onRemove &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={onRemove}
+           className="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-muted-foreground hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500/10 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+           title="Remove model"
+         &gt;
+           &lt;svg
+             className="w-4 h-4"
+             fill="none"
+             viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+             stroke="currentColor"
+             strokeWidth={1.5}
+           &gt;
+             &lt;path
+               strokeLinecap="round"
+               strokeLinejoin="round"
+               d="M14.74 9l-.346 9m-4.788 0L9.26 9m9.968-3.21c.342.052.682.107 1.022.166m-1.022-.165L18.16 19.673a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244 2.077H8.084a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244-2.077L4.772 5.79m14.456 0a48.108 48.108 0 00-3.478-.397m-12 .562c.34-.059.68-.114 1.022-.165m0 0a48.11 48.11 0 013.478-.397m7.5 0v-.916c0-1.18-.91-2.164-2.09-2.201a51.964 51.964 0 00-3.32 0c-1.18.037-2.09 1.022-2.09 2.201v.916m7.5 0a48.667 48.667 0 00-7.5 0"
+             /&gt;
+           &lt;/svg&gt;
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+       )}
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

Done! I've updated the parameter structure across all relevant files. Here's a summary of the changes:

**New format (array with `id` field):**
```json
{
  "parameters": [

      "id": "next_unanswered_question_index",
      "type": "integer",

      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

**Files updated:**

1. **`src/app/tools/page.tsx`**:

2. **`src/components/ToolPicker.tsx`**:

3. **`src/app/tests/page.tsx`**:
   - `addToolFromSelection` handles both formats
   - `getToolParamsForSelectedTool` handles both formats
   - `toolHasParams` handles both formats

All code maintains **backward compatibility** with the legacy object format, so existing tools will continue to work while new tools will be created with the array format.

Done! I've updated all the files to:

1. **Not send `description` inside `config`** when creating/updating tools - it's now only sent at the top level

2. **Read `description` from top-level first**, with fallback to `config.description` for backward compatibility

**Files updated:**

- **`src/app/tools/page.tsx`**: 
  - Added `description?: string` to `ToolData` type
  - Removed `description` from `config` in POST/PUT requests
  - Updated reading and displaying to use `tool.description || tool.config?.description`

  - Added `description?: string` to `AvailableTool` type
  - Updated search filter

- **`src/components/agent-tabs/ToolsTabContent.tsx`**:

  - Updated search filter and table display
